name: Shift4Shop E-Commerce Platform API
what_it_does: Hosted e-commerce platform (formerly 3dcart) with REST API — enabling merchants to manage product catalogs, orders, customers, inventory, and store operations, with the platform rebranded under Shift4 Payments ownership in 2020, offering free plans for Shift4 payment-processing customers, API access for custom integrations and automation.
use_cases: Managing product catalog via Shift4Shop API for inventory sync with ERP or marketplace
Retrieving and processing orders via Shift4Shop API for fulfillment automation
Syncing customer data via Shift4Shop API for CRM integration
Automating promotional pricing via Shift4Shop API for marketing campaigns
Building custom integrations for existing 3dcart/Shift4Shop stores via REST API
not_for: New enterprise-scale deployments (Shopify Plus, Magento for enterprise; Shopify for general)
Developers without existing Shift4Shop stores needing a platform API (Shopify is developer-first)
Complex B2B procurement workflows (Shift4Shop is SMB retail-focused)
best_when: An existing 3dcart or Shift4Shop merchant needs to automate operations, sync data with external systems, or build custom integrations for their established store.
avoid_when: Starting a new store, needing enterprise B2B features, or requiring a developer-first commerce API ecosystem.

auth.notes: Private API access: API key (SecureURL + PrivateKey + Token). Public app (OAuth2): client ID + secret + access token via authorization code flow. Both methods require 3dcart/Shift4Shop store account. REST API documentation still at apirest.3dcart.com (legacy domain). Webhooks for order/product events. No fine-grained OAuth scopes. API documentation largely unchanged since 3dcart era.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan available for US merchants using Shift4 payment processing
pricing.notes: Originally 3dcart (founded 1997, Tamarac, Florida by Gonzalo Gil). Acquired by Shift4 Payments 2020, rebranded Shift4Shop. Shift4 is a major US payment processor (NYSE: FOUR). Free plan exclusive to US merchants using Shift4 for payment processing (unique model). 22,000+ active merchants. Used by: US SMBs, retailers, specialty stores. Strong US-centric feature set. Over 200 built-in features. Shift4 integration gives payment processing advantage for existing Shift4 merchants. Limited international payment methods compared to Shopify.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with dual auth (API key or OAuth2). API documentation at legacy 3dcart domain. Webhooks. PCI-DSS. US-focused. Rebranded from 3dcart — older documentation still references 3dcart. Free plan requires Shift4 payment processing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product/order reads idempotent by ID. Order creation not natively idempotent. Customer reads idempotent. Check for existing orders before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation still at apirest.3dcart.com — legacy domain from 3dcart era, still functional
Rebranded from 3dcart to Shift4Shop 2020 — documentation may use both names interchangeably
Private API: SecureURL + PrivateKey + Token (3 credentials required, not just API key)
Free plan requires using Shift4 as payment processor — not a standalone free platform
US-centric platform — limited international payment methods and shipping carriers
Acquired by payment processor (Shift4) — platform direction tied to Shift4 corporate strategy

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI-DSS compliant (Shift4 Payments is a major PCI-compliant processor). API key + OAuth2 options. US data residency. No OAuth scope granularity. Shift4 Payments infrastructure provides security foundation. 3-credential private API (SecureURL + PrivateKey + Token) — complex auth.
